items.section: Part 1. Information About the Person Filing this Petition (Petitioner)
items.instruction: Use the juvenile petitioner's legal name exactly as it appears on the state court order and primary identity documents (birth certificate, passport). The juvenile is the petitioner in SIJS self-petitions.

items.section: Part 1. Information About the Person Filing this Petition (Petitioner)
items.instruction: Provide the juvenile's USCIS Online Account Number if one has been created. Leave blank if the juvenile has never created a USCIS online account.

items.section: Part 1. Information About the Person Filing this Petition (Petitioner)
items.instruction: Provide the juvenile's U.S. Social Security Number, if any. Leave blank if the juvenile has never been issued an SSN.
items.where_to_verify: SSN Card; Tax Records; BIO CALL

items.section: Part 1. Information About the Person Filing this Petition (Petitioner)
items.instruction: Provide the juvenile's A-Number (omit the 'A-' prefix). Leave blank if no A-Number has been assigned.
items.where_to_verify: EAD Card; I-94; USCIS Receipt; BIO CALL

items.section: Part 1. Information About the Person Filing this Petition (Petitioner)
items.instruction: Provide the juvenile's current U.S. mailing address. Use the firm address (P.O. Box 231704, Houston, TX 77223) only when the engagement letter directs notices to the firm.

excluded_sections.name: For USCIS Use Only
excluded_sections.reason: Completed by USCIS, not the client.

excluded_sections.name: START HERE
excluded_sections.reason: Instructional text; not a fillable field.

excluded_sections.name: Part 1, Item 5 (IRS Employer Identification Number)
excluded_sections.reason: Only applicable when the petitioner is an organization (Religious Worker, Broadcaster, etc.); not used for SIJS individual petitioners.

items.section: Part 1. Information About the Person Filing this Petition (continued)
items.form_text: Petitioner's Physical Address (if different from mailing address)
items.instruction: Provide the juvenile's actual physical residence address. If identical to the mailing address in Items 6, leave blank.

excluded_sections.name: Part 2 (Classification Requested)
excluded_sections.reason: Classification box selection (Special Immigrant Juvenile) is verified by the attorney; client does not select it.

items.section: Part 3. Information About the Person this Petition is For (Beneficiary)
items.instruction: In SIJS self-petitions the petitioner and the beneficiary are the same juvenile; restate the juvenile's name exactly as in Part 1.

items.section: Part 3. Information About the Person this Petition is For (Beneficiary)
items.instruction: Provide the juvenile's residence address. Typically matches Part 1 mailing or physical address.

items.section: Part 3. Information About the Person this Petition is For (Beneficiary)
items.instruction: Provide the juvenile's date of birth in 'Mmm DD YYYY' format (e.g., Mar 21 2008). Must match the birth certificate; the juvenile must be under 21 on the date the petition is filed.

items.section: Part 3. Information About the Person this Petition is For (Beneficiary)
items.instruction: Provide the country where the juvenile was born; must match the birth certificate and passport.

items.section: Part 3. Information About the Person this Petition is For (Beneficiary)
items.instruction: Restate the juvenile's SSN, if any. Must match Part 1, Item 3.
items.where_to_verify: SSN Card; Tax Records; BIO CALL

items.section: Part 3. Information About the Person this Petition is For (Beneficiary)
items.instruction: Restate the juvenile's A-Number (without 'A-' prefix). Must match Part 1, Item 4.
items.where_to_verify: EAD Card; I-94; USCIS Receipt; BIO CALL

items.section: Part 3. Information About the Person this Petition is For (Beneficiary)
items.instruction: An SIJS beneficiary must be unmarried at the time of filing and through adjudication. If the juvenile has ever been married (annulled, divorced, widowed), select the applicable status; for never-married, select Single.

items.section: Part 3. Information About the Person this Petition is For (Beneficiary)
items.form_text: Date of Last Arrival in the United States (Mmm DD YYYY)
items.instruction: Provide the most recent U.S. entry date in 'Mmm DD YYYY' format. Source from I-94, passport entry stamp, or the juvenile's recollection if no record exists.

items.section: Part 3. Information About the Person this Petition is For (Beneficiary)
items.instruction: Provide the 11-digit I-94 number (if any). Retrieve from i94.cbp.dhs.gov or the most recent I-94 print-out in the case file.
items.where_to_verify: Form I-94; CBP Records; BIO CALL

items.section: Part 3. Information About the Person this Petition is For (Beneficiary)
items.instruction: Provide the juvenile's passport number, if any. Source from a copy of the passport biographic page in the case file.

items.section: Part 3. Information About the Person this Petition is For (Beneficiary)
items.instruction: Provide a travel document number only if the juvenile entered with a travel document instead of a passport.

items.section: Part 3. Information About the Person this Petition is For (Beneficiary)
items.form_text: Country of Issuance for Passport or Travel Document
items.instruction: Provide the country that issued the passport or travel document above.

items.section: Part 3. Information About the Person this Petition is For (Beneficiary)
items.form_text: Passport or Travel Document Expiration Date (Mmm DD YYYY)
items.instruction: Provide the expiration date in 'Mmm DD YYYY' format.

items.section: Part 3. Information About the Person this Petition is For (Beneficiary)
items.instruction: Provide the juvenile's current immigration status (e.g., 'No status / EWI', 'Parole', 'TPS', 'F-1', 'Pending asylum'). Source: prior USCIS filings and I-797 receipts.

items.section: Part 3. Information About the Person this Petition is For (Beneficiary)
items.instruction: Provide the expiration date of the current status, if any.

items.section: Part 4. Processing Information
items.instruction: Mark the juvenile's sex as listed on the birth certificate or government-issued identity document.

excluded_sections.name: Part 4 - Consular/processing items (Items 1.a, 1.b, 2.a, 2.b, 4.a, 4.b, 5, 6, 7)
excluded_sections.reason: Processing strategy (adjustment vs. consular, prior removal proceedings, etc.) is determined and entered by the attorney.

excluded_sections.name: Part 5 (Spouse and Children)
excluded_sections.reason: SIJS beneficiaries must be unmarried; spouse never applies. Children are listed only when the juvenile actually has biological children, which is uncommon.

items.section: Part 8. Complete Only If Filing for a Special Immigrant Juvenile
items.instruction: Restate the juvenile's current legal name exactly as in Part 1, Items 1.a-1.c.
items.where_to_verify: Juvenile Court Order; Predicate Order; Declaration

items.section: Part 8. Complete Only If Filing for a Special Immigrant Juvenile
items.form_text: Other Names Used (including name on the state court order)
items.instruction: Provide the juvenile's name exactly as it appears on the state court order if it differs from the current legal name. Include any prior legal names, maiden names, or aliases used in immigration filings.
items.where_to_verify: Juvenile Court Order; Predicate Order; Declaration

excluded_sections.name: Part 8 - Court order findings, custody, and reunification checkboxes (Items 2.a-2.c, 3.a, 3.b, 3.A_Checkbox, 3.b_Checkbox, 4.a, 4.b, 5, 6.a, 6.b)
excluded_sections.reason: These items reflect the contents and legal effect of the state court order. They are completed by the attorney based on the order itself, not by the juvenile client.

items.section: Part 11. Petitioner's Statement, Contact Information, Declaration, Certification, and Signature
items.instruction: Provide a daytime number where the juvenile or the juvenile's legal guardian can be reached. Source: intake / BioCall.

items.section: Part 11. Petitioner's Statement, Contact Information, Declaration, Certification, and Signature
items.instruction: Provide the juvenile's (or guardian's) mobile number if different from the daytime number.

items.section: Part 11. Petitioner's Statement, Contact Information, Declaration, Certification, and Signature
items.instruction: Provide a current email; client email is preferred when available.

items.section: Part 11. Petitioner's Statement, Contact Information, Declaration, Certification, and Signature
items.form_text: Petitioner's Date of Signature (Mmm DD YYYY)
items.instruction: Date the petitioner (juvenile) signs Item 6.a in ink. Must use 'Mmm DD YYYY' format. The signature itself is wet-ink only and is not auto-filled.

excluded_sections.name: Part 11, Items 1.a-1.b (Petitioner statement language) and Item 2 (interpreter checkbox)
excluded_sections.reason: Whether an interpreter was used and the language are entered by the attorney based on the firm's intake notes.

excluded_sections.name: Part 12 (Authorized Signatory for Organizations)
excluded_sections.reason: Only applies when the petitioner is an organization (Religious Worker, Broadcaster). Not used in SIJS individual petitions.
